message:
fix(agents): respect CODEX_HOME env var for auth check

Updates check_agent_auth() to use CODEX_HOME environment variable
when looking for Codex auth.json, falling back to ~/.codex if unset.

This allows users with non-standard Codex home directories to have
their authentication status correctly detected.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -345,7 +345,8 @@ check_agent_auth() {
     fi
 
     # Codex: Check for OAuth auth.json (uses ChatGPT accounts, not API keys)
-    if [[ -f "$target_home/.codex/auth.json" ]]; then
+    local codex_home="${CODEX_HOME:-$target_home/.codex}"
+    if [[ -f "$codex_home/auth.json" ]]; then
         log_detail "  Codex: configured"
     else
         log_warn "  Codex: not configured (run 'codex login' to authenticate)"
